steps.title: Compare the approaches
steps.content: Text 1 presents an asteroid impact explanation for Nadir and lists features that support it. Text 2 evaluates two alternative causes: carbonate dissolution and subsurface salt withdrawal.

steps.title: Avoid misread differences
steps.content: A invents excitement in Text 2, B reverses the focus of Text 1, and D says Text 2 argues against impact even though it tests alternatives. The real difference is one plausible cause versus two possible causes. The answer is C.
